actions.text: OWASP Juice Shop "King of the Hill" Facemask13.49¤
Do not share my personal information
GitHub CopilotWrite better code with AI
GitHub SparkBuild and deploy intelligent apps
GitHub Advanced SecurityFind and fix vulnerabilities
Code securitySecure your code as you build
Secret protectionStop leaks before they start
Learn more about funding links in repositories
Add context files for 4 other AI agents
Change liveness (or readiness) probe to port 3000
chore: fix CSAF sorting, language to lower, and version
Ignore all warnings on websocket URL
Add support for displaying system wide notifications from MultiJuicer
Fix: update outdated repo references from bkimminich to juice-shop
Prevent accidental i18n overwrites during runtime
Migrate to new Angular App Builder
Use range interval in process restart counter
fix(checkout): prevent invalid orders and race conditions in placeOrd…
Lock latest coding challenge snippet cache
Add upload/complaints folder to packaged archives
Move coverage exclusion to CodeClimate config
Add first draft of DEF CON 33 theme
Change my default mail address to owasp
Add generic context file for other AI agents
Update Code of Conduct and several project badges
Update PR template to mandate AI Tool Disclosure
Upgrade docker image to use node24 & debian 13 by default
Add NDC Security x Project Summit 2026 sessions
Set Node.js engine to current recommended version
Add support for displaying system wide notifications from MultiJuicer
Use actual latest Docker image for smoke testing
Remove incorrect dom lib set in tsconfig
The most trustworthy online shop out there.
The best juice shop on the whole internet!
Actually the most bug-free vulnerable application in existence!
But this doesn't have anything to do with juice.
the Running OWASP Juice Shop documentation
